overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving along a desert highway toward the Night City skyline. The clip features sparse traffic overtaking, a large roadside billboard, and ends with the vehicle pulling onto a dirt shoulder near abandoned structures.

events.description: silver SUV overtakes on the left side at high speed
black pickup truck passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: driving forward on the desert highway toward the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: silver SUV overtaking quickly on the left
black pickup truck passing on the left

entered.detail: weathered asphalt road with faded lane markings stretching toward the city
futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers visible on the horizon
sparse desert vegetation dotting the rocky landscape
tall commercial billboard with advertisements standing beside the highway
arid rocky outcrops and dry brush on the roadside
derelict low-rise structure visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sun-baked desert highway stretching toward the distant Night City skyline. Sparse Joshua trees dot the rocky terrain while a large billboard stands prominently on the right. Two vehicles, a silver SUV and black truck, overtake the camera vehicle on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway corridor with electrical infrastructure

events.description: large billboard passes out of view to the right as power line pylons become prominent
white van travels ahead in the same direction
teal sedan overtakes quickly on the left side

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along the highway as the landscape features shift

notable_agents.action: white van traveling in the same direction ahead on the highway
teal sedan overtaking at high speed on the left

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission towers running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: The drive continues along the desert highway as the billboard recedes and power line pylons line the right side. The abandoned building on the left grows gradually closer. Traffic remains light with a white van ahead and a teal sedan overtaking.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder approaching abandoned desert structures

events.description: vehicle steers right onto the dirt and gravel shoulder
transitioning from paved highway to desert dirt shoulder near abandoned buildings

agents.ego_description: pulling off the paved highway onto the dirt shoulder and approaching abandoned structures

entered.detail: highway signpost on the roadside shoulder
derelict red vehicle with graffiti parked near the abandoned building
unpaved gravel and dirt area beside the main highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the paved highway onto a gravel shoulder, kicking up dust as it approaches a derelict building. A road sign and abandoned red car become visible on the left. The highway recedes to the right as the camera moves deeper onto the desert terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a sun-baked desert highway that gradually transitions from a high-speed transit toward the distant Night City skyline to a slow approach toward derelict roadside structures. It begins on a stretch of rocky terrain dotted with Joshua trees, passing a prominent roadside billboard as a silver SUV and black truck overtake the vehicle on the left. As the billboard recedes, the camera continues forward past power line pylons while a white van leads the way and a teal sedan passes by. The scene then shifts as the vehicle exits the paved highway onto a gravel shoulder, kicking up dust and moving away from the main road. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the desert terrain, passing a road sign and an abandoned red car to arrive beside a derelict building.
